mapper.select: SELECT id, expense_request_id AS expenseRequestId, challenge_id AS challengeId, barcode_number AS barcodeNumber, amount, status, used_at AS usedAt, used_merchant_name AS usedMerchantName, used_merchant_category AS usedMerchantCategory, pg_tx_id AS pgTxId, expires_at AS expiresAt, created_at AS createdAt FROM woorido.payment_barcodes WHERE expense_request_id = #{expenseRequestId}
